description.value:
Disease: Rotting Plague — Severity: [Serious] — Stage 4

Effects: As Stage 3. Failure at this stage deals [[/damage 8]] damage per long rest until cured.

Recovery: [[/save type=fortitude]] at end of each long rest (Hard task — 2 successes cures; 1 success = no change; 0 = worsen).

system.vector: Undead claws, corpse-handling without protection, necrotic wounds

damageTick.chatMessage: [[/damage 8]] damage from Rotting Plague (Stage 4) — failed long rest save.

recovery.chatMessage: Make a [[/save type=fortitude]] to recover from Rotting Plague (Stage 4).
